instruction: Summarize the CVE description using professional cybersecurity language.
input: A reflected XSS vulnerability has been found in Axiell Iguana CMS, allowing an attacker to execute code in a victim's browser. The module parameter on the Service.template.cls endpoint does not properly neutralise user input, resulting in the vulnerability.
output: A reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability has been identified in the Axiell Iguana CMS. This issue permits attackers to execute arbitrary scripts in the browser of a victim. The vulnerability is due to improper neutralization of user input in the 'module' parameter of the Service.template.cls endpoint.
